title: Royal College of Physicians and Surgeonsof Glasgow ransomware incident

victim.name: Royal College of Physicians and Surgeonsof Glasgow

extortion.description: The Royal College of Physicians and Surgeons of Glasgow, is an institute of physicians and surgeons in Glasgow, Scotland. No one from this college is interested to save personal data of students and employees. Sad but true. You will have the opportunity to download the files (800Gb) soon.
